message.content:
@startuml
participant "SalesClerk" as Actor

interface «presentation» DefineNewCategoryUI as UI

interface «application» DefineNewCategoryController as Controller

interface «builder» CategoryBuilder as Builder

interface «domain» category:Category as Domain

database «repository» CategoryRepository as Repository

Actor -> UI : 1 Define new category
UI -> Controller : 2 create
Controller -> Builder : 7 withCode(code)
Controller -> Builder : 8 withDescription(description)
Builder -> Domain : 9 create(categoryCode, categoryDescription)
Domain -> Builder : 10 category
Builder -> Controller : 11 category
Controller -> Repository : 13 categoryRepository
Controller -> Repository : 14 save(category)
UI -> Actor : 16 displayCategoryInfo

@enduml
